title: Arkteach
description: Developed over a 1.5-month timeline during my internship as a Full-Stack Developer and Project Manager, I, with my team, engineered this interactive e-learning platform from the ground up. I successfully integrated AI-driven content generation and comprehensive analytics tracking, resulting in a highly streamlined employee onboarding and training process for the company.

title: Landas (Capstone)
description: Across a 9-month development cycle, I directed the creation of an engaging 2D Android game promoting Philippine history. By implementing rigorous testing protocols, I led the project to successfully achieve strict ISO/IEC 25010 compliance across 8 quality metrics, culminating in a 4.75/5 user satisfaction rating and the 'Best in Capstone' award.

title: Maintenance Checksheet System
description: Delivered within an accelerated 3-week sprint, I help in architecting a digitized Quality Assurance protocol for machine diagnostics. I successfully integrated industrial methodologies into the system logic, optimizing factory floor maintenance workflows and standardizing reporting protocols.

title: Assembly Tree Finder
description: Over a 1-month development phase as a Full-Stack Developer and a team of two, we built a dynamic visualization tool mapping complex manufacturing components. We designed an intuitive hierarchical 'Family Tree' UI that drastically reduced retrieval times, empowering production employees to conduct rapid, error-free part identification on the factory floor.

title: Printify Queue System App
description: A full-stack, multi-tenant SaaS printing queue management system. It features a responsive web portal for client document uploads with dynamic cost calculation, integrated with a standalone React Native Android admin application. The system enables real-time queue monitoring, status tracking, and native print execution, powered by a hybrid architecture utilizing Firebase for real-time synchronization and PHP/MySQL for secure file management.

title: KuroNeko: Journey in Another World
description: Built within a rapid 2-week timeline as the project manager, game designer and developer, we developed a custom 2D desktop platformer to demonstrate robust Object-Oriented Programming principles. we successfully engineered bespoke gameplay mechanics, custom physics handling, and complex state management entirely from scratch using Java Swing.

title: Meowtivator
description: Evolving over a 1-year continuous integration cycle, I engineered a highly scalable, embeddable interactive chat widget. I implemented JSON-driven architectures, regex-based keyword detection, and dynamic mood transitions, successfully delivering instant, personalized user engagement directly within my portfolio.

title: Interactive Easter Eggs
description: A collection of hidden, app-like interactive modules embedded within the portfolio. Engineered features include a global draggable YouTube Music player with LocalStorage state persistence, an interactive CFOP Rubik's Cube algorithm cheat sheet, a theme-responsive CSS Grid Bento UI for an anime showcase, and a DOM-manipulated SVG animated cat swarm.

title: IcommunaPh
description: Completed during a concentrated 2-week academic sprint, I co-developed a comprehensive community event discovery and management portal. I successfully integrated secure PHP backend routing and MySQL databases with a responsive front-end dashboard, delivering a seamless and secure user engagement experience.

title: stbJobs
description: Over a 1-month development timeline, I led the architecture and team coordination for a localized job portal in Santo Tomas, Batangas. I successfully directed the full-stack integration of secure user authentication and database management, launching a highly accessible, community-focused platform.

title: CatEnFur V2
description: Executed in a rapid 48-hour development sprint of my existing past project, I built a dedicated e-commerce and care portal for feline enthusiasts. I successfully combined a sleek, responsive UI with secure PHP/MySQL data handling, creating a robust minimum viable product (MVP) for product browsing and care education.

title: AIB - Border App
description: Completed in a fast-paced 3-day design challenge, I engineered an immersive web experience exploring interface boundaries and visual hierarchy. I successfully implemented modern CSS grid structures and 'Bento Box' styling to craft a highly engaging, thematic introduction to the lore of Borderland.

title: StillLife Parallax V2
description: Executed in a rapid 48-hour academic sprint, I created an artistic web study focused on advanced CSS parallax scrolling. I successfully demonstrated the ability to create depth and visual storytelling through layered DOM manipulation.

title: Material Navigator
description: Over a 1-month development phase during my internship as a Full-Stack Developer and a team of two, we engineered an internal logistics and tracking dashboard. We successfully designed the system to drastically reduce retrieval times by streamlining factory material routing workflows for warehouse personnel.

title: PhotoGallery Page V2
description: Evolving over continuous iterations, I built an interactive, responsive media gallery featuring dynamic grid layouts. I successfully optimized the platform to showcase visual assets with fast loading times and sleek hover states.

title: WordYou Sure? V2
description: Developed and refined over multiple updates, I engineered a vocabulary application powered by external REST APIs. I successfully implemented the backend logic to fetch and parse live dictionary data, providing instant definitions and contextual examples.

title: PlaceHub Page V2
description: Continuously refined from its initial build, I developed a digital tourism platform highlighting the municipal landmarks of Santo Tomas, Batangas. I successfully structured the application to prioritize intuitive navigation and content-rich presentation.

title: ArcaneLog Page
description: Built and enhanced over several iterations, I designed a thematic landing page dedicated to the Netflix series 'Arcane'. I successfully experimented with complex visual styling, custom typography, and seamless media integration.

title: Product Page V2
description: Continuously optimized over time, I developed a refined product landing page focused on conversion-driven UI/UX. I successfully implemented a clean component hierarchy alongside robust responsive layout logic.

title: 404 Not Found
description: Developed as a functional enhancement for my portfolio architecture, I created a custom error handling page. I successfully designed it to maintain visual consistency while intuitively guiding lost users back to the main content.

title: Welcome to schoolProjects
description: Executed as a streamlined utility page, I built a dedicated loading and routing gateway. I successfully engineered the architecture to provide a seamless transition for users accessing archived academic coursework within the portfolio.

title: SteveHungry
description: Created an interactive 2D desktop game with my Landas teammates where the player controls Minecraft's Steve. We developed the core game loop, entity rendering, and collision detection logic to allow players to collect food for points within a strict time limit while avoiding randomized rotten items.

title: Beyond the End
description: Developed a Java Swing application that renders a comic-style animated sequence. I programmed this visual novel-style prologue to explore the lore of Herobrine in Minecraft, demonstrating robust UI rendering, timed asset loading, and event handling within a Java environment.

title: Convertables
description: Built a comprehensive console application serving as a multi-tool conversion utility. I structured the C++ program to accurately process complex conversions like currency, speed, length, and area using standardized algorithmic formulas and a clean terminal interface.

title: CMathings
description: Engineered a console-based utility program providing essential mathematical tools. I implemented a modular CLI architecture featuring a calculator, metrics table, and multi-unit conversions, focusing on robust user input validation and logical control flow.
